text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: We thank you all for joining us today.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: No, thank YOU!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Did you enjoy singing with us?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: YEAH!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But we're not finished yet. Can you<n>feel a fever
coming on? Are your<n>heartbeats racing?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: YEAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Stage B, are we good to go?

text_block_list.name: Stage B Singer
text_block_list.text: All set! The atmosphere is electric!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay, then it's time for our next song!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I'd forgotten just how fun concerts<n>are!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Um, Hello!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Is something the matter? An issue<n>with the stage?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
No, nothing like that. I just wanted to<n>tell you
something. In person.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many times I have to<n>be a backup
dancer, I'll never stop<n>aiming for center stage.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Because now I know how many fans<n>are waiting
for me to get there.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I'll always sing and dance with<n>gratitude and a
smile. Thank you for<n>everything!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
...Of course. You'll always have us<n>fans watching
over you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm beat. Up next is...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Me! I got you, Falcon!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay, it's all you then! Go bring the<n>house down!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: You bet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Exchanging a high five, a new star<n>steps into the
spotlight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There were no shadows on the stage<n>that day.
